verdict: 2026-07-02 19:33 PDT — Sound approach. I would satisfy the ACs essentially this way: keep `NumberInput` as the local draft boundary, add explicit focus state so blur can resync even when `value` is unchanged, extract the focused/unfocused draft rule into a tiny pure helper for node-env tests, and use native `min="0"` on the affected number inputs. The changed files match that shape, stay inside the requested scope, and do not reinvent an existing dependency or framework construct.
